items.plaintext: I think we need to share more.
I think I need to share more.
Every day, people are asked "how are you?"
I feel like there are lots of reasons we don't speak up.  Life has a way of shutting us up.
I feel like one of those reasons is the idea that people's thoughts aren't "on topic".
I know there's a little part of me that thinks that nobody wants to hear what I have to say, especially if it's not about the specifically nerdy topics I'm "relevant" enough to speak about.
I feel like that's a concern that creeps in over a career: you've gotta stay "on brand", right?
I think a lot of us are in the habit of preemptively shutting up.  And I'm going on out a limb and saying that might be a bad habit we can all try to break.
Let's talk about anything and everything.
I hope this will be fun.

record.description: Off topic, off brand, off print
record.textContent:
I think we need to share more.
I think I need to share more.
Every day, people are asked "how are you?"
Every day, people lie.
I feel like there are lots of reasons we don't speak up.  Life has a way of shutting us up.
I feel like one of those reasons is the idea that people's thoughts aren't "on topic".
I know there's a little part of me that thinks that nobody wants to hear what I have to say, especially if it's not about the specifically nerdy topics I'm "relevant" enough to speak about.
I feel like that's a concern that creeps in over a career: you've gotta stay "on brand", right?
I think a lot of us are in the habit of preemptively shutting up.  And I'm going on out a limb and saying that might be a bad habit we can all try to break.
So let's go off topic.
Let's go off brand.
Let's talk about anything and everything.
I hope this will be fun.
Let's find out.
record.title: Off topic
